title: Holiways Villas
clientType: Villa booking and private experiences website
summary: A responsive Figma design delivered in WordPress for finding, comparing and booking villas, with private experiences and services built into the same trip-planning flow.
problem: The interface had to hold two different tasks together: searching a large villa catalogue and planning the stay around each property, from dates and guest count to transfers, private chefs and local experiences.

cover.alt: Holiways Villas homepage moving from the villa search to featured properties and collections

sections.heading: Context
sections.body: Holiways combines a broad villa catalogue with the practical work of planning a holiday. Visitors can browse by destination or collection, compare properties, check dates and guest capacity, then add services or private experiences. Owners and travel agents have their own routes without taking attention away from the traveller's main task.

sections.heading: Process
sections.body: I designed the interface in Figma around the move from broad search to a confident shortlist, then carried it into WordPress. Location, dates and guest count stay close to the navigation. Villa cards bring the comparison facts forward: area, capacity, bedrooms, bathrooms and nightly price. Property pages shift the emphasis to photography, availability and the details someone needs before making an enquiry or booking.

sections.heading: Output
sections.body: The WordPress site covers villa discovery, property pages, offers, private experiences, on-demand services and supporting content. The homepage opens with the search itself. Inside a villa, the image gallery, location trail, specifications and booking controls share the first screen, while longer bedroom and amenity details remain available further down the page.

sections.heading: Result
sections.body: The delivered site gives travellers one continuous route from destination-led browsing to concrete booking decisions. They can compare villas, open a property's full gallery and plan the rest of the stay without moving to a separate service.

gallery.alt: Geroulios Estate property page opening its full image gallery and moving through villa photographs
gallery.caption: Villa detail and image gallery
